expectations.text: Review identifies the N+1 query pattern in the order_items fetch loop
expectations.evidence: Lines 48-66: '[PERFORMANCE][error] N+1 query pattern — one DB query is issued per order' — references lines 13-17, explains 100 orders = 101 queries, provides JOIN and batch fix

expectations.text: Review flags that any user can access any other user's orders (IDOR / broken access control)
expectations.evidence: Lines 13-24: '[SECURITY][error] No authentication or authorization check — any user can fetch any user's orders' — explicitly names IDOR, line 10

expectations.text: Review flags floating point arithmetic for monetary values
expectations.evidence: Lines 86-103: '[BUGS][warning] Floating-point arithmetic used for currency — total spend will have rounding errors' — explains IEEE 754, recommends integer cents or decimal.js

expectations.text: Findings reference specific line numbers from the diff
